description: Style NoteWant to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make an exclusive style statement with this Ssteele watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to class-up your accessory collection! The new range of watches are a fresh take on the Ssteele eye for perfection and are great for urban wear.  Product DetailsCase style: Black stainless steel round case  Dial style: White dial with fluorescent green hands  Strap style: Black plastic strap with a butterfly claspFeatures: Date aperture on the dial, Ssteele branding on the 12 hour mark, Maxima branding on the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time   Waterproof to 3 ATM, allowing you to wear it even when showeringWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 33 mm  Case thickness: 6 mm
